property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:/Users/Qedge/.p2/pool/plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.10.v20260205-0638/jre/bin/server;C:/Users/Qedge/.p2/pool/plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.10.v20260205-0638/jre/bin;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Windows\System32;C:\Users\Qedge\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;%IntelliJ IDEA%;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs;D:\apache-maven-3.9.13\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.3\bin;C:\Users\Qedge\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\Qedge\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Qedge\Desktop;;.

testcase.name: runScenario["", ""](1)
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. WARNING: Found tags option '@Customers,@Suppliers not'. Support for '@tag1,@tag2' will be removed from the next release of Cucumber-JVM. Please use '@tag or @tag2' instead Mar 17, 2026 6:50:35 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 17, 2026 6:50:35 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.80. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.25.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["", ""](2)
testcase.system-out:
Background: Successful Login # ./featureFiles/ERP.feature:4 Given User is on the Login Page # ERPSteps.launchUrl() When User enters username "admin" and password "master" # ERPSteps.user_enters_username_and_password(String,String) And clicks on Login button # ERPSteps.clicks_on_Login_button() Dashboard page Displayed Then Dashboard should be displayed # ERPSteps.dashboard_should_be_displayed()
@tag @Customers Scenario Outline: # ./featureFiles/ERP.feature:44 As admin user i want to test customer with Multiple data When user should navigate to add customer page # ERPSteps.user_should_navigate_to_add_customer_page() And user capture customer number # ERPSteps.user_capture_customer_number() And User enters customer Details "Alice W3", "Lane 57", "London", "UK", "Alice", "1122334455", "alice@test.com", "5544332211", "Retail" # ERPSteps.user_enters_customer_Details(String,String,String,String,String,String,String,String,String) And user click add button # ERPSteps.user_click_add_button() And user click confirm ok button # ERPSteps.user_click_confirm_ok_button() And user click alert ok button # ERPSteps.user_click_alert_ok_button() And user search for customer number # ERPSteps.user_search_for_customer_number() Customer-00000003823 Customer-00000003823 Then user verify customer number in table # ERPSteps.user_verify_customer_number_in_table() When user close browser # ERPSteps.user_close_browser() When user click customer link # null
testcase.system-err: Mar 17, 2026 6:50:56 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 17, 2026 6:50:56 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.80. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.25.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

Background: Successful Login # ./featureFiles/ERP.feature:4 Given User is on the Login Page # ERPSteps.launchUrl() When User enters username "admin" and password "master" # ERPSteps.user_enters_username_and_password(String,String) And clicks on Login button # ERPSteps.clicks_on_Login_button() Dashboard page Displayed Then Dashboard should be displayed # ERPSteps.dashboard_should_be_displayed()
